headline: Marriott International Named a 2026 Where You Work Matters Platinum Employer
summary: Marriott International today announced it has been recognized as a 2026 Platinum Employer on the Where You Work Matters List, the highest overall distinction, honoring U.S. employers that create high‑quality jobs and expand opportunity through strong career advancement and long‑term retention. Marriott is the only hotel company that is a platinum overall employer on the Where You Work Matters List.

headline: JLL CEO says growth is now uncertain in the Middle East
summary: JLL has a major footprint in the Middle East, managing and leasing properties in Dubai and Abu Dhabi in the United Arab Emirates and in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

headline: JW Marriott Marco Island Beach Resort to sell in $835M deal
summary: Sculptor Diversified Real Estate Income Trust will acquire the Florida property, along with two Naples golf courses, as luxury hotel investment picks up.

headline: The Gulf built a global events empire, now war is putting it on ice
summary: As war grounds flights and threatens to destabilize the region's carefully built future, events from cultural to crypto have been quietly rescheduled.
